## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Biologica content creation progress, product details, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [PDP (Product Detail Page) content is a priority; Brian shared access to the latest draft for reference](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [New team members introduced: Matthew (Chief Content Officer) and Jess (Managing Editor)](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Content quality is improving; pipeline now \~80% accurate, aiming for 95%](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Trademarked ingredients are a key differentiator; team to decide on consistent mention strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [Maggie (medical reviewer) to provide feedback on recent articles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Liz's mom (former OBGYN) joining as additional medical reviewer next week](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Team exploring fact-checking workflows for internally generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Jess to manually review and incorporate recent feedback into writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Product Details

  - [Product comes in a tin containing 30 sachet packets (6g each)](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Tins and sachets have unique motifs/colors for each life stage](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [No sugar; majority of content is active ingredients + effervescent system](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Official brand guidelines document coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)

### Content Pipeline Improvements

  - [Manual application of ingredient lists to be automated in workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Recent feedback not yet integrated into writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Trademarked ingredients now included in ingredient list for pipeline use](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [First mention of trademarked ingredients includes brand name; team to decide on consistency](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

### Website Structure

  - [PDP and homepage are core pages; others include Hormones 101](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Ingredient section planned with deeper dives into formulation components](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Site map expected by August 19th; will inform internal linking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)

### External Linking

  - [Pipeline generally providing good external links](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Some secondary/tertiary sources replaced with primary, authoritative sources](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [Team to notify of any undesired sources for blacklisting](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Brian to confirm with Joey about consistent trademarked ingredient mentions](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [Team to review latest batch of articles for medical claim caution and ingredient positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Jess to tag Brian when making modifications to artifacts in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Brian to share site map (expected August 19th) for breadcrumb and internal linking planning](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [Team to continue refining pipeline for higher accuracy and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Wz__oNVbTCbDVyD1oXV6fz8wFz6R7Peo?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
